name: Tame Green Chile Salsa New Mexico
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Tomato; cut up, and their juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant.
3. Blend in flour, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
4. Add diced green chile (fresh, canned, or frozen) and chopped tomatoes with their juice.
5. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. If needed, add water to reach desired consistency.
8. Optionally, add half a cup of minced onion along with the garlic during step 2.
